name: Cranberry Pecan Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a 4-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add celery and onions; cook until tender.
3. Add broth. Bring to boiling point.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in stuffing mix, cranberries, and nuts until well coated.
5. Stuff the turkey (12-14 lbs) according to package instructions.
6. Bake remaining stuffing with the turkey in a covered casserole dish for 30 minutes.
